## Permission Table

<table>
<tr>
<th>Identifier</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>


<tr>
<td>

`pdf-render:allow-render`

</td>
<td>

Enables the render command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`pdf-render:deny-render`

</td>
<td>

Denies the render command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>
</table>
